title: BOYS & GIRLS CLUB - 211info
text: BOYS & GIRLS CLUB OF WESTERN LANE COUNTY BOYS & GIRLS CLUB Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides a positive space for youth to engage in fun and empowering programs, such as leadership and community service, after-school programs, academic enrichment, workforce training, performing and visual arts, camps, and personal health and fitness. 1501 Airport Road Florence, OR 97439 Eligibility: Grades 5-12 Hours: After-School program: Monday-Friday 2:30pm-5:30pm Summer program: Monday-Friday 9am-5:30pm Email (541) 902-0304 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers (541) 902-0304 Main phone Main phone (541) 902-0304 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Walk in, call, or visit website for more information FEES: $25/year base membership fee Teen Center: $50 per month grades 5-12 DOCUMENTS: All enrollments are online AREA SERVED: Cities of Florence and Mapleton SITE HOURS: After-School program: Monday-Friday 3pm-5:30pm Summer program: Monday-Friday 9am-5:30pm, hours may vary Services: Boys/Girls Clubs Camps Youth Enrichment Programs Other Services Offered At This Location: LEISURE ACTIVITIES/RECREATION - HEALTH AND FITNESS If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service.
